testcase.name: Create a new walk-in booking for a new guest with cash payment
testcase.system-out: Given I am logged in........................................................passed When I navigate to bookings page............................................passed And I create a new booking with guest details...............................passed Then the booking should be created successfully.............................passed

testcase.name: Create a reservation booking for 5 rooms and 6 nights with cash payment
testcase.system-out: Given I am logged in........................................................passed When I navigate to bookings page............................................passed And I create a reservation booking for 5 rooms and 6 nights.................passed Then the reservation booking should be created successfully.................passed

testcase.name: Create a walk-in booking for Non Smoking Double Beds room type with cash payment
testcase.system-out: Given I am logged in........................................................passed When I navigate to bookings page............................................passed And I create a walk-in booking for NSDB room type...........................passed Then the booking should be created successfully.............................passed

testcase.name: Create a reservation booking for Non Smoking Double Beds room type with cash payment
testcase.system-out: Given I am logged in........................................................passed When I navigate to bookings page............................................passed And I create a reservation booking for NSDB room type.......................passed Then the reservation booking should be created successfully.................passed

testcase.name: Check in a guest
testcase.system-out: Given I am logged in........................................................passed When I navigate to arrivals page............................................passed And I select a booking and check in.........................................passed Then the guest should be checked in successfully............................passed

testcase.name: Successful login with valid credentials - Example #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given I am on the login page................................................passed When I enter username "webdev" and password "1234"..........................passed And I click the login button................................................passed Then I should be logged in successfully.....................................passed
